task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met: (1) RenameRequest struct properly defined with json-tagged Source and Destination fields in api/types.go; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go correctly POSTs to /api/rename; (3) Server.RenameHandler in server/routes.go validates source/destination, returns StatusNotFound (404) when source missing, StatusConflict (409) when destination exists, copies model via CopyModel then removes source; (4) Route registration r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) present; (5) CLI command "ollama rename SOURCE DEST" with cobra.ExactArgs(2) implemented; (6) CLI RenameHandler function properly calls client.Rename; (7) No existing tests modified, only additive changes. Implementation is complete and correct.
